Script Security Platform

Protect & Track Your Scripts with Catmio

The complete platform for Lua script authors. Obfuscate, distribute, and monitor your scripts with enterprise-grade security and detailed analytics.

Get Started — FreeLogin

Everything You Need

Catmio provides all the tools you need to secure and manage your Lua scripts.

🔒

Script Protection

Obfuscate and protect your Lua scripts with multiple strength levels to prevent unauthorized access.

📋

Execution Logging

Track every script execution with IP address, HWID, timestamp, and game information.

🚫

HWID Ban System

Ban specific hardware IDs to prevent abusive users from accessing your scripts.

🔔

Webhook Notifications

Receive real-time notifications for every execution event via webhook integrations.

⚙️

Admin Panel

Manage all users, view analytics, and control your platform from a powerful admin dashboard.

📊

Analytics

Visualize execution trends, top scripts, and user activity with detailed charts and tables.

Ready to secure your scripts?

Join Catmio today and take control of your script distribution.
